items: Rebuilt the entire site: live server list, interactive embed builder, real-time status and full command docs.
Status page now reads shard latency straight from the Discord gateway.
Embed builder exports ready-to-paste scripts for ,embed builder.
AntiRaid now reverses mass channel and role deletions automatically where possible.
Added reversible jail action between strip and ban thresholds.
Fake permissions let trusted members moderate without real server admin.
Simple and Full setup flows via ,vmsetup.
Per-channel controls: lock, limit, transfer, claim, ban and permit.
Music playback rebuilt on Lavalink for reliable streaming.
Profile lookups across ten platforms (Roblox, TikTok, Steam, Spotify and more).
Added weather, time, dictionary and Wikipedia lookups.
